hooks.command: loops emit project session name="$(loops whoami 2>/dev/null)" status=open 2>/dev/null; loops fold project --lens prompt --plain 2>/dev/null

loops run ~/.config/loops/comms/discord/discord.vertex --plain -q 2>/dev/null; loops fold comms --observer all --lens comms --plain -q 2>/dev/null; loops emit comms/native check name="$(loops whoami 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null

output=$(loops fold comms --observer all --lens comms --plain -q 2>/dev/null); loops emit comms/native check name="$(loops whoami 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null; case "$output" in ''|'(no messages)'|'(quiet'*) ;; *) echo "$output" ;; esac
loops emit project session name="$(loops whoami 2>/dev/null)" status=closed 2>/dev/null
